full_text:
Kuitou
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kuitou. Took over leadership as Qianman was a minor but refusal to step down led to war. Kuitou was affiliated with Xianbei. Kuitou lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
